applicability_text: 2018 earthquake design and adaptable dwelling unit requirements may continue for permits applied for until 2025-03-09; certain in-stream projects remain exempt.
citation_text: BCBC 2024 transition provisions for earthquake design and adaptable dwelling units

applicability_text: Chapter I as it read on 2025-04-16 may still apply when covered work begins before 2026-10-17.
Chapter I.1 as it read on 2024-07-12 may still apply to work covered by sections 1.1.2 and 1.1.3 when work begins before 2025-01-13.
Chapter III as it read on 2024-07-10 may still apply to plumbing work that begins before 2025-01-11.
citation_text: Order in Council 983-2024, 2024 G.O. 2, 2635, amended by Order in Council 1071-2024, 2024 G.O. 2, 3129

applicability_text: Chapter VIII as it read on 2025-04-16 may still apply before 2026-10-17, while some provisions come into force later on separate dates.
The code as it read on 2014-12-31 may apply where a permit was applied for before 2015-01-01 and construction commences within 6 months.
The code as it read on 2017-06-30 may apply where a permit was applied for before 2017-07-01 and construction commences within 6 months.
The code as it read on 2017-12-31 may apply where a permit was applied for before 2018-01-01 and construction commences within 6 months.
The code as it read on 2019-12-31 may apply where a permit was applied for before 2020-01-01 and construction commences within 6 months.
The code as it read on 2021-12-31 may apply where a permit was applied for before 2022-01-01 and construction commences within 6 months.
Certain provisions of the code as they read on 2016-12-31 may continue to apply until 2017-07-01 for in-stream projects.
